title: DMK MP Kanimozhi seeks clarity on seat distribution from Amit Shah; PM Modi speaks in Rajya Sabha | LIVE
description: Parliament special session LIVE: DMK's Kanimozhi slammed the delimitation bill as Lok Sabha debate on The Constitution (One Hundred and Thirty-First Amendment) Bill, 2026 resumes. The bill provides 33 per cent reservation to women in Parliament and Delimitation Bill, which will increase seats to 850
